mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_career_plan.recruitment_data ( job_name, city, address, salary_range, company_name, industry, company_size, company_nature, company_type, job_code, job_detail, job_description, job_requirements, company_description, update_date, source_url, publish_date, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{jobName}, #{city}, #{address}, #{salaryRange}, #{companyName}, #{industry}, #{companySize}, #{companyNature}, #{companyType}, #{jobCode}, #{jobDetail}, #{jobDescription}, #{jobRequirements}, #{companyDescription}, #{updateDate}, #{sourceUrl}, #{publishDate}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )

INSERT INTO ai_career_plan.recruitment_data ( job_name, city, address, salary_range, company_name, industry, company_size, company_nature, company_type, job_code, job_detail, job_description, job_requirements, company_description, update_date, source_url, publish_date, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{job.jobName}, #{job.city}, #{job.address}, #{job.salaryRange}, #{job.companyName}, #{job.industry}, #{job.companySize}, #{job.companyNature}, #{job.companyType}, #{job.jobCode}, #{job.jobDetail}, #{job.jobDescription}, #{job.jobRequirements}, #{job.companyDescription}, #{job.updateDate}, #{job.sourceUrl}, #{job.publishDate}, #{job.createTime}, #{job.updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY job_name ORDER BY RANDOM()) as rn FROM ai_career_plan.recruitment_data WHERE job_name IS NOT NULL ) t WHERE rn <= #{sampleSize} ORDER BY job_name, id
SELECT * FROM ai_career_plan.recruitment_data ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM ai_career_plan.recruitment_data WHERE id BETWEEN #{startId} AND #{endId} ORDER BY id
